description: Use this API to calculate differences between the working case and a designated Saved Case (activity GDIF). Results may be programmatically accessed via the internally accessible fetch routines DIFTXT, DIFBUS, DIFBRN, DIF3WN, DIF2DC, DIFMDC and DIFFCT. Usage is: call to GDIFAPI with APIOPT = 0; multiple calls to fetch routines; optionally, repeat of above steps for different Saved Case and/or subsystem; final call to GDIFAPI with APIOPT = 1. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = gdif(sid, all, apiopt, namarg, filarg)
python_syntax: ierr = gdif(sid, all, apiopt, namarg, filarg)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. subsystem sid must have been previously defined. (input; used only when APIOPT is 0; 0 by default).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag. (input; used only when APIOPT is 0; 1 by default).

parameters.name: apiopt
parameters.description: Mode of operation of gdifapi. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: namarg
parameters.description: Flag indicating how to match up buses in the two cases. (input; used only when APIOPT is 0; 0 by default).

parameters.name: filarg
parameters.description: Name of saved case file to be compared to the working case (when apiopt is 0). (input; no default allowed).

all.description: process only buses in subsystem SID.

apiopt.description: apply difference calculations and fill arrays used by fetch routines.
deallocate arrays used by fetch routines.

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
